steps.title: Set each factor to zero
steps.content:
By the zero-product property, one factor must equal zero.
$$6x=0 \quad\text{or}\quad x-4=0 \quad\text{or}\quad x+8=0$$

steps.title: List the solutions
steps.content: The solutions are $x=0$, $x=4$, and $x=-8$. Among the choices, $0$ is listed. The answer is B.
